page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter Feria 2026: Celebrate San Bernabé from the Sea

data.meta_description: Book a marbella yacht charter feria 2026 for San Bernabé. Watch fireworks & parades from the sea. Prices from €749/2h. Enquire via WhatsApp.
data.summary: Celebrate the Feria de San Bernabé 2026 in Marbella from the water with a private yacht charter. Watch fireworks, enjoy onboard drinks, and avoid the crowds—prices start at €749 for 2 hours.
key_facts: Feria de San Bernabé runs 7–14 June 2026 in Marbella.
Fireworks launched over the sea near Puerto Banús.
Charters from €749/2h (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) incl. skipper + drinks.
Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) from €4,719/4h with free jet ski.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Depart from Puerto Banús—5 min from Marbella town.
Book via WhatsApp for boats not listed in Tiers A/B.

faq.q: What is the Feria de San Bernabé?
faq.a: It is Marbella's annual fair honouring the city's patron saint, held 7–14 June 2026. It features parades, live music, fairground rides, and nightly fireworks over the sea.

faq.q: Can I watch the fireworks from a yacht?
faq.a: Yes. Many charters anchor near Puerto Banús or along the Marbella coastline for clear views of the fireworks display. Boats like the Azimut 58 Flybridge offer flybridge decks perfect for viewing.

faq.q: Which boats are best for a group during the feria?
faq.a: For groups up to 12, we recommend the Mangusta 80 (24m) or Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m). Both have spacious decks and ample seating. The Mangusta 80 also includes a free jet ski.

faq.q: How much does a yacht charter cost for the feria?
faq.a: Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, rising to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) are €4,719 minimum 4 hours. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and VAT.

faq.q: Do I need to book early for the Feria 2026?
faq.a: Yes. The feria is peak season, and popular boats like the Mangusta 80 and Ferretti 94 book weeks in advance. Contact us via WhatsApp to secure your preferred date and time.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

faq.q: Can I depart from a marina other than Puerto Banús?
faq.a: All our boats depart from Puerto Banús. It is centrally located, just 5 minutes from Marbella town centre, making it convenient for feria access.

faq.q: What happens if the weather is bad on the day?
faq.a: We monitor conditions closely. If the forecast is unsafe, we will reschedule or offer a full refund. Our skippers prioritise safety at all times.

data.body_html:
Planning your marbella yacht charter feria 2026 is the smartest way to celebrate San Bernabé without the crowds. Each June, Marbella transforms into a whirlwind of flamenco dresses, fairground lights, and nightly fireworks over the Mediterranean. Instead of jostling for a spot on the promenade, anchor a private yacht off Puerto Banús and watch the show from the water. With prices starting at €749 for two hours (all inclusive), it is a memorable upgrade for couples, families, or groups of up to 12 guests.

What is the Feria de San Bernabé?

The Feria de San Bernabé is Marbella's biggest annual festival, held from 7 to 14 June 2026. It celebrates the city's patron saint with a full programme: daytime parades, live music in the fairground, traditional casetas (tented bars), and a spectacular fireworks display launched over the sea near Puerto Banús. The atmosphere is electric, and the coastline becomes a prime vantage point.

Why charter a yacht for the feria?

A private charter gives you front-row seats to the fireworks without the noise and crush of the crowds. You can anchor off the Golden Mile or near Cabopino, enjoy unlimited drinks from the onboard bar, and leave when you please. Boats like the Mangusta 80 come with a flybridge deck for panoramic views, plus a free jet ski to explore between events.

Our recommended boats for Feria 2026

We offer a fleet of 18 boats departing from Puerto Banús. For feria fireworks, the following are especially popular:

  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – Tier B, from €4,719 for 4 hours, includes jet ski.
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) – Flybridge seating ideal for fireworks viewing.
  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – Tier A, €749 for 2 hours, great value for small groups.
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – Luxury option with spacious saloon and deck.

All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and VAT.

Feria 2026 schedule highlights

The main fireworks display typically takes place around 11:30 PM on the final Saturday (13 June 2026). Daytime events include the cabalgata (parade) through Marbella town and the encierro (bull run) simulation. For exact timings closer to the date, check Marbella's official tourism site.

How to book your marbella yacht charter feria 2026

Booking is straightforward. Choose your boat from our fleet, then contact us via WhatsApp with your preferred date and time. For Tier A and B boats, you can book directly online. For other vessels (e.g., Fairline Targa, Pershing 46), we will provide a custom quote. We recommend booking at least three weeks in advance for the feria period.

What to expect on board

Every charter includes a licensed English-speaking skipper who knows the best anchor spots for the fireworks. You will find a cooler stocked with water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, and cava, plus light snacks. Most boats have a stereo system for music, and larger yachts offer cabins and toilets. Just bring sunscreen, a jacket for the evening breeze, and your camera.

Nearby anchorages and extras

Before the fireworks, you can cruise to Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for a swim, or stop at Estepona for a seafood lunch. Some charters allow you to add a water toy (e.g., paddleboard or inflatable) for an extra fee. The Mangusta 80 already includes a jet ski in the price.

Frequently asked questions

What is the Feria de San Bernabé?

It is Marbella's annual fair honouring the city's patron saint, held 7–14 June 2026. It features parades, live music, fairground rides, and nightly fireworks over the sea.

Can I watch the fireworks from a yacht?

Yes. Many charters anchor near Puerto Banús or along the Marbella coastline for clear views of the fireworks display. Boats like the Azimut 58 Flybridge offer flybridge decks perfect for viewing.

Which boats are best for a group during the feria?

For groups up to 12, we recommend the Mangusta 80 (24m) or Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m). Both have spacious decks and ample seating. The Mangusta 80 also includes a free jet ski.

How much does a yacht charter cost for the feria?

Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours, rising to €2,299 for 8 hours. Tier B boats (Mangusta 80) are €4,719 minimum 4 hours. All prices include skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and VAT.

Do I need to book early for the Feria 2026?

Yes. The feria is peak season, and popular boats like the Mangusta 80 and Ferretti 94 book weeks in advance. Contact us via WhatsApp to secure your preferred date and time.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs.

Can I depart from a marina other than Puerto Banús?

All our boats depart from Puerto Banús. It is centrally located, just 5 minutes from Marbella town centre, making it convenient for feria access.

What happens if the weather is bad on the day?

We monitor conditions closely. If the forecast is unsafe, we will reschedule or offer a full refund. Our skippers prioritise safety at all times.

Ready to secure your marbella yacht charter feria 2026? Browse our full fleet and contact us via WhatsApp for availability. Don't miss the best seat in Marbella this June.
